name: Who Knows Me Best?
description: Alternate answering deep questions about yourself while your partner tries to guess your answer. A test of true intimacy!

prompts.text: Do I love giving or receiving flowers?
What do I prefer: humor or smarts?
Am I friends with my exes?
When did I move out of the house?
Which set of grandparents do I spend my annual vacations with?
Am I open to adoption?
How easily do I forgive a person?
What do I think is the sexiest chore a partner could do?
Do I love traveling alone or with a group of people?
Do I tear up easily when watching movies?
Is my childhood best friend still a part of my life?
Do I love my job?
Do I believe in love at first sight?
How do I apologize?
Am I afraid of lizards, snakes, and other similar reptiles?
What physical challenge have I mastered?
Where do I see myself in 10 years?
Do I see myself growing old with my girlfriend/boyfriend now?
What is my biggest turn off?
Was I a good student or kind of a slacker?
Do I spend time planning weekend getaways?
If I could be a superhero, what powers would I want to have?
If I could turn a movie into my life, which one would it be?
What is my dream wedding?
What is my favorite band?
Am I the jealous type?
Do I believe in the paranormal?
Is this my natural hair color?
Have I ever been on a blind date?
What is my favorite alcoholic drink?
Have I ever cheated before?
Is there a physical feature I’m self-conscious with?
What is my ideal date-night?
If I could choose how to do a marriage proposal, how would it go?
Which boy-band do I hate with a passion?
Do I love surprises?
Am I a green thumb?
Do I plan to have kids? If so, do I have an ideal number of kids?
What 3 traits do I love most in a partner?
Do I speak any foreign language?
What 3 things make me nervous?
Am I an artistic soul?
Is there a music genre that I absolutely hate?
Do I get flattered easily?
How many boyfriends/girlfriends have I had?
Did I ever have to go to the emergency room as a grownup? Why?
Am I a fan of podcasts?
What is my favorite t-shirt of all time?
Have I ever tried and loved paintball, laser tag, and other similar activities?
Did I ever break someone’s heart?
Do I like pastel colors?
Am I good at handling money?
What do I think about online dating?
Do I enjoy exercising?
Am I a beach person or a lake person?
Which celebrity do I love?
What is my all-time favorite phone app?
What pastime am I passionate about?
Do I collect anything?
Do I prefer hiking or Netflix binge-watching on a weekend?
Am I a morning person?
What is the thing that annoys me the most?
Do I have a funny skill that has no use?
Am I allergic to any food?
Am I an organized person when it comes to my things?
What other phobias do I have?
Which song gets on my nerves the most?
What is my favorite holiday?
What is my most-used stress relief technique?
Do I believe in aliens and life-after-death?
Do I have any hidden talents?
Do I have a bad habit I’ve been trying to change?
What 5 things do I always have in my bag/purse/pocket?
What is my height?
Do I love trying something new?
How quickly can I start a fire?
Where is the furthest place I’ve ever visited?
Have I ever had a near-death experience?
If I could choose a charity to give some of my money to, which one would it be?
Do I have an ultimate life goal?
